title: of RA No. 12021 shall only apply to monetary awards, including but not limited to, the
content: salaries, wages, statutory benefits, death and disability claims, claims for damages and other similar awards of seafarers arising from complaints filed with the NLRC or NCMB on or after the date of effectivity of the law. Complaints filed prior to the effectivity of the law shall be governed by the laws, rules, and regulations prevailing as of the date of their filing.
